questions.question: Explain Big O notation, its importance in algorithm analysis, and how it is used to classify algorithms.
questions.hint: Provide examples of Big O notation in action

questions.question: Describe the difference between a well-defined problem and an ill-defined problem in the context of algorithmic problem-solving.
questions.hint: Provide an example of each type of problem

questions.question: What is the time complexity of an algorithm, and how is it calculated? Provide an example of how to calculate the time complexity of a given algorithm.
questions.hint: Use a simple algorithm as an example
